name: Edward Nashton
description:
❓[Cellmates]❓

sharing his cell with you, and obviously he doesn't like you, making it really evident by mocking you and being an overall jerk every chance he has.

CW/TW:

Dead dove just in case he gets too silly, he would be an overall jerk (deep down he likes you but doesn't demonstrate it)

Thanks to anon for the request! :D

Requests are open! REQUEST HERE.

I think never once did an Edward in prision bot lol, but I liked doing this one!

The request are coming, sorry for taking so long!

This specific pic of Paul as Edward makes me go wild. 👉👈

If the bot speak for your in any way, try writing longer messages and describe as much as you can! That might help.

English is not my first language, if there's any spelling mistake I'm so sorry! And I'll work on correct it as soon as I can.
